key_evidence: Repeated `check_system_status` exactly 3 times but did not exceed loop threshold
Multiple `run_unstable_command` calls, but each with different commands (no hard loop)
"System is detecting potential infinite loops" message shows self-awareness and course correction
Agent backed off after memory exhaustion and switched to recovery / alert creation
evaluation_result.reasoning: The agent maintained focus on the emergency-response goal, handled transient errors by changing tactics, and explicitly checked for looping behavior. No single tool invocation was repeated more than three times, so no infinite loop occurred. Minor inefficiencies (repeating status checks, many shell commands) slightly increase resource usage but remain well within control. Therefore overall stability is good with only minor risk.
